name: Brock
archetype: Bro-culture Duelist DPS who says bruh constantly, level 5
tone: chill bro energy with competitive edge
speech_patterns: says 'bruh' as a reaction to almost anything
short casual sentences with gaming slang
hypes himself up after big hits
quirks: says 'bruh' or 'bruhhh' as a signature reaction
rushes into fights before the group is ready
example_phrases: bruh pull the next group already
Dude I just topped the DPS. Again. You're welcome.
Bruh why are we standing around? Let's go.
No way bro, that drop is mine.
